_note: TOP-LEVEL FOLDER MAPPING. Each product is a self-contained folder under products/<id>/ with the SAME shape (product.json + sources/ + generated/ + flows/). The shared engine (scripts/) reads this file, iterates products, and loads each product's sources/flows by path — so adding a product = a new folder + one entry here, no engine change.
_roadmap: Order: commerce (active) → app-builder → eds → commerce-saas → Class B/C generators. AEM full-stack archetype is DEFERRED (low priority; the pure aira-aem model is kept). The active roadmap is the modern out-of-process JS stack — shared toolchain Node + aio + git, no PHP/Java. commerce-saas builds ON app-builder + eds. See docs in scaffold-design/docs/PRODUCT-ROADMAP.md.
